---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or protocol improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve?

## Protocol Compliance

Confirm the proposal complies with the protocol rules:

- [ ] Fully deterministic (no random without deterministic seed)
- [ ] Post-quantum only (no ECDSA, RSA, secp256k1)
- [ ] Does not change the supply cap (21,000,000,000 $PLG)
- [ ] Does not introduce duplicate functionality

## Proposed Implementation

Optional: describe how you would implement this.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?
